change.final_action: Rejected and code/test changes reverted after primary prompt verifier failed.
change.summary: Candidate lowered only the auto-tuned mid-context full-attention post/RoPE prefill chunks from 1024 to 512 rows; full-attention query stayed 4096 and linear/MoE stayed 1024.

checks.name: primary gate
checks.result: Stable IDs 220/570 and flat memory; candidate primary min decode 115.074319 tok/s.

checks.name: prompt verifier
checks.result: 512/128 prefill/decode regressed versus the retained decode-policy-cache baseline (1958.536 / 127.263 -> 1917.323 / 127.128 tok/s); 4K prefill was only a tiny/noisy nudge and 4K decode was flat/small positive (114.991 -> 115.074 tok/s).

commands.guard: HIPENGINE_COMPILER_VERSION_FILE=/tmp/hipengine-hipcc-version-713.txt python3 -m pytest tests/test_gguf_t16_repack.py tests/test_gguf_q8_0_t16_gemv_decode.py tests/test_gguf_t16_selected_gemv_decode.py tests/test_gguf_q6_k_t16_gemv_decode.py tests/test_gguf_gemv_decode_dispatch.py tests/test_qwen35_gguf_compact_moe_gemv_routing.py -q
